tweets.text:
The Democrat Party has chosen to become a Satanic Cult.

https://t.co/AhokrnmdXK

Democrats have chosen to put murderous drug gangs, perverts, and criminals on the streets where you and your kids walk, in the parks where you and your kids play, in the restrooms you and your kids use, in the schools your kids attend.

Democrats brought these criminals here with your tax dollars
Democrats shelter these criminals with Sanctuary City/State laws
Democrats pay these criminals with your tax dollars.
Democrats feed these criminals with your tax dollars.
Democrats shut down the government to provide healthcare to these criminals with your tax dollars.
Democrats house these criminals in five star hotels with your tax dollars.
Democrats sue with your tax dollars to keep these criminals near you and your kids.
Democrats pay for protests and riots to protect these criminals with your tax dollars.
Democrat DAs refuse to prosecute these criminals' violent crimes to keep them near you and your kids.
Democrat judges immediately release these criminals if they are arrested to keep them near you and your kids.
So many choices The Democrat Party makes hurt and kill Americans.

The Democrat Party chose to increase their violence rhetoric after President Trump was shot, and increase it again after Charlie Kirk was killed.

The Democrat Party chose to hate you and your kids.
The Democrat Party chose to want you and your kids dead.

The Democrat Party's choices tell us who they are.

Democrats chose to bankrupt the USA by adding 20 million illegal aliens to welfare rolls.
Democrats chose to disrupt the USA by decriminalizing crime, releasing violent criminals, and importing terrorists.
Democrats chose to undermine Presidential authority by seditiousness.

People have died, are dying due to Democrat Party choices.

Democrats are beginning a Communist Revolution again the USA.

Believe The Democrat Party when they tell you who they are.

Choose better than Democrats.

Our lives and our Republic depends upon it.
